meaning: n.(=tipper truck,=tipper lorry)给小费的人,翻斗卡车,自动下货车
examples: If we know a regular customer is a good tipper, then we make sure he gets good service.
Al, Tipper, Hillary, and I had gotten to know one another in a way that would have been impossible without those long hours on the bus.
Hillary and Tipper also made brief appearances.
Observers say Tipper Gore talking about it now in public forums serves to inoculate her against further regulations.
Now Gore's wartime letters to his future wife, Tipper, are also under the microscope in a new article in "Talk" magazine.
